element_introduction_order.mastery_context: single-player point-based scoring, skill demonstration on half-pipe
navigation through park terrain, racing mechanics
head-to-head competition against AI opponent in urban downhill setting
hand-to-hand knockout combat competition; progression faces Poseur Pete (beginner), Aggro Eddie (intermediate), Bionic Lester (advanced)

element_introduction_order.element: Character roster (Poseur Pete, Aggro Eddie, Bionic Lester)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: difficulty-scaled opponents; player advances through skill tiers

typical_relief_triggers: progression to easier difficulty tier opponent
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: event-driven with escalating difficulty; tension builds through progression from solo point-based events to direct competition to combat-style knockout jousts

difficulty_curve.early_game: solo ramp and jump events introduce mechanics with point-scoring feedback; low pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: downhill race and jam events introduce navigation and head-to-head competition; moderate pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: pool joust features direct knockout competition with escalating opponent tiers (Pete → Eddie → Lester); highest pressure and skill requirement
notable_spikes: transition from solo point-scoring to head-to-head competitive events
pool joust introduction as hand-to-hand combat mechanic
Bionic Lester final boss joust for advanced players

notable_level_patterns.description: Up to 8 players can sign up and compete sequentially across all five events. Sequential play creates cumulative challenge and engagement.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: full tournament mode with event rotation

notable_level_patterns.description: Pool joust features tiered opponents: Poseur Pete (beginners), Aggro Eddie (intermediate), Bionic Lester (advanced pros). Skill gate advances players through content.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: pool joust event with Rodney Recloose's cronies

notable_level_patterns.description: Downhill events exist in two contexts: park setting (race) and street setting (jam). Environmental variation differentiates event mechanical flow.
